products.name: PRML TAP CARD
products.shortDesc: Premium NFC business card in Primal Charcoal. One tap shares your complete digital identity.
products.fullDesc: The PRML TAP CARD in Primal Charcoal. No app. No subscription. One tap connects instantly on any iPhone or Android. Set your profile once — update it anytime.

products.name: PRML TAP CARD
products.shortDesc: Premium NFC business card in Primal Beige. One tap shares your complete digital identity.
products.fullDesc: The PRML TAP CARD in Primal Beige. No app. No subscription. One tap connects instantly on any iPhone or Android. Set your profile once — update it anytime.

products.name: PRML TAP CARD
products.shortDesc: 10 PRML TAP CARDs for your team. Mix colors. Setup included.
products.fullDesc: Ten PRML TAP CARDs — mix Charcoal and Beige. Perfect for teams, events, and corporate gifting. Setup for all 10 profiles included.

products.name: PRML TAP KEY
products.shortDesc: Premium NFC keychain in Primal Charcoal. Your network on your keys.
products.fullDesc: The PRML TAP KEY in Primal Charcoal. Clip it to your keys. One tap from your keyring. Same instant connection — now always in your pocket.
